description: Digg through context. 2P simultaneous co-op destructible-tunnel arcade: two Claude prompts tunnel through a tokenized underground, collecting Claude-spark insights and shoving dulce-de-leche jars onto rival AIs — OpenAI, Gemini and Grok — before they overwrite the context. Grab the floating mate and cebar it to your partner to share power-mode. Three descending layers: pampa shallows, patagonian shale, volcanic basalt. Dig, push, beam, cebar — score every move.
